headline: Treasury Yields Rise Ahead of U.S. Labor Data
summary: Treasury yields rise, on path for a quarterly increase. An agreement to fully restore shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remains elusive and oil prices edge higher. Fed funds futures price at least one Fed hike this year, according to CME.

headline: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Secures $9.2 Billion In New Credit Facilities
summary: Automatic Data Processing secured new credit facilities totaling $9.2b. The package includes a 364 day revolving credit agreement and a five year revolving credit agreement. These facilities replace the company’s previous credit arrangements. Automatic Data Processing, traded as NasdaqGS:ADP, has put fresh financing lines in place that could matter for how investors evaluate its balance sheet strength.
